languages.text: "Рядовой Цевчик!" {n}Гаркает мужчина, не отрывая взгляда от экрана.{/n} "Память отшибло? Заблудился? Ты..." {n}Он поднимает на вас цепкие, хитрые глаза, и оправляется. {/n}"Прошу простить, Ваша Светлость! Не признал. Интендант Куравич, то бишь губернатор Куравич, к вашим услугам". {n}Он неуклюже кланяется, и вас окатывает резким запахом пота.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Рядовой Цевчик!" {n}Гаркает мужчина, не отрывая взгляда от экрана.{/n} "Память отшибло? Заблудился? Ты..." {n}Он поднимает на вас цепкие, хитрые глаза, и оправляется. {/n}"Прошу простить, Ваша Светлость! Не признал. Интендант Куравич, то бишь губернатор Куравич, к вашим услугам". {n}Он неуклюже кланяется, и вас окатывает резким запахом пота.{/n}

languages.text: "Private Tsevchik!" {n}he snaps, without looking away from the screen.{/n} "Have you lost your mind? Or lost your way? Well, you..." {n}He lifts his sharp, cunning eyes toward you and straightens up.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't recognise you. Quartermaster Kuravich, I mean, Governor Kuravich, at your service." {n}He gives a clumsy bow, and the reek of sweat washes over you.{/n}

Well, you..." {n}He lifts his sharp, cunning eyes toward you and straightens up.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't recognise you. Quartermaster Kuravich, I mean, Governor Kuravich, at your service." {n}He gives a clumsy bow, and the reek of sweat washes over you.{/n}

languages.text: “列兵茨维克！”{n}他厉声喝道，眼睛却没离开过屏幕。{/n}“你是昏了头？还是迷了路？好啊，你……”{n}他抬起那双锐利狡黠的眼睛望向你，连忙直起身。{/n}“万分抱歉，大人！我没认出您来。军需官库拉维奇，我是说，总督库拉维奇，听候您的差遣。”{n}他笨拙地鞠了一躬，一股汗臭味扑面而来。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Private Tsevchik!" {n}he snaps, without looking away from the screen.{/n} "Have you lost your mind? Or lost your way? Well, you..." {n}He lifts his sharp, cunning eyes toward you and straightens up.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't recognise you. Quartermaster Kuravich, I mean, Governor Kuravich, at your service." {n}He gives a clumsy bow, and the reek of sweat washes over you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “列兵茨维克！”{n}他厉声喝道，眼睛却没离开过屏幕。{/n}“你是昏了头？还是迷了路？好啊，你……”{n}他抬起那双锐利狡黠的眼睛望向你，连忙直起身。{/n}“万分抱歉，大人！我没认出您来。军需官库拉维奇，我是说，总督库拉维奇，听候您的差遣。”{n}他笨拙地鞠了一躬，一股汗臭味扑面而来。{/n}

languages.text: "Er Tsevchik!" {n}Gözlerini ekrandan ayırmadan çıkışıyor.{/n} "Aklını mı kaçırdın? Yoksa yolunu mu kaybettin? Sen..." {n}Keskin, kurnaz gözlerini sana çevirip doğruluyor.{/n} "Özür dilerim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Sizi tanıyamadım. Ben Levazım Subayı, yani Vali Kuravich. Hizmetinizdeyim." {n}Beceriksizce eğiliyor. Ter kokusu sana kadar ulaşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Private Tsevchik!" {n}he snaps, without looking away from the screen.{/n} "Have you lost your mind? Or lost your way? Well, you..." {n}He lifts his sharp, cunning eyes toward you and straightens up.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't recognise you. Quartermaster Kuravich, I mean, Governor Kuravich, at your service." {n}He gives a clumsy bow, and the reek of sweat washes over you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Er Tsevchik!" {n}Gözlerini ekrandan ayırmadan çıkışıyor.{/n} "Aklını mı kaçırdın? Yoksa yolunu mu kaybettin? Sen..." {n}Keskin, kurnaz gözlerini sana çevirip doğruluyor.{/n} "Özür dilerim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Sizi tanıyamadım. Ben Levazım Subayı, yani Vali Kuravich. Hizmetinizdeyim." {n}Beceriksizce eğiliyor. Ter kokusu sana kadar ulaşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Soldat Tsevchik ! {n}s'exclame-t-il sans quitter l'écran des yeux.{/n} Auriez-vous perdu l'esprit ? Ou votre chemin ? Parce que vous... » {n}Lorsque son regard vif et rusé se pose sur vous, il se redresse immédiatement.{/n} « Toutes mes excuses, Votre Seigneurie ! Je vous ai {mf|pris|prise} pour quelqu'un d'autre. Quartier-maître... pardon, gouverneur Kuravich, à votre service. » {n}Il vous adresse une révérence maladroite qui fait parvenir à vos narines des relents de sueur.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Private Tsevchik!" {n}he snaps, without looking away from the screen.{/n} "Have you lost your mind? Or lost your way? Well, you..." {n}He lifts his sharp, cunning eyes toward you and straightens up.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't recognise you. Quartermaster Kuravich, I mean, Governor Kuravich, at your service." {n}He gives a clumsy bow, and the reek of sweat washes over you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Soldat Tsevchik ! {n}s'exclame-t-il sans quitter l'écran des yeux.{/n} Auriez-vous perdu l'esprit ? Ou votre chemin ? Parce que vous... » {n}Lorsque son regard vif et rusé se pose sur vous, il se redresse immédiatement.{/n} « Toutes mes excuses, Votre Seigneurie ! Je vous ai {mf|pris|prise} pour quelqu'un d'autre. Quartier-maître... pardon, gouverneur Kuravich, à votre service. » {n}Il vous adresse une révérence maladroite qui fait parvenir à vos narines des relents de sueur.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Soldado Tsevchik!», {n}grita sin apartar la mirada de la pantalla.{/n} «¿Ha perdido la cabeza? ¿O es que se ha perdido? Bueno, pues...». {n}Levanta la mirada, astuta y penetrante, y se endereza.{/n} «¡Perdóneme, mi{mf|lord|lady}! No le había reconocido. Intendente Kuravich, digo gobernador Kuravich, a su servicio». {n}Te hace una torpe reverencia y el olor a sudor llega a tu nariz.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Private Tsevchik!" {n}he snaps, without looking away from the screen.{/n} "Have you lost your mind? Or lost your way? Well, you..." {n}He lifts his sharp, cunning eyes toward you and straightens up.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't recognise you. Quartermaster Kuravich, I mean, Governor Kuravich, at your service." {n}He gives a clumsy bow, and the reek of sweat washes over you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Soldado Tsevchik!», {n}grita sin apartar la mirada de la pantalla.{/n} «¿Ha perdido la cabeza? ¿O es que se ha perdido? Bueno, pues...». {n}Levanta la mirada, astuta y penetrante, y se endereza.{/n} «¡Perdóneme, mi{mf|lord|lady}! No le había reconocido. Intendente Kuravich, digo gobernador Kuravich, a su servicio». {n}Te hace una torpe reverencia y el olor a sudor llega a tu nariz.{/n}

languages.text: "Private Tsevchik!", {n}entgegnet er knapp, ohne vom Bildschirm aufzusehen.{/n} "Habt Ihr den Verstand verloren? Oder habt Ihr Euch verlaufen? Tja, Ihr ..." {n}Er sieht dich mit seinen scharfen, listigen Augen an und richtet sich auf.{/n} "Verzeihung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich habe Euch nicht erkannt. Quartiermeister Kuravich, ich meine Gouverneur Kuravich ... zu Euren Diensten." {n}Als er sich unbeholfen verbeugt, kannst du seinen sauren Schweiß riechen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Private Tsevchik!" {n}he snaps, without looking away from the screen.{/n} "Have you lost your mind? Or lost your way? Well, you..." {n}He lifts his sharp, cunning eyes toward you and straightens up.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I didn't recognise you. traits.locale_text: "Private Tsevchik!", {n}entgegnet er knapp, ohne vom Bildschirm aufzusehen.{/n} "Habt Ihr den Verstand verloren? Oder habt Ihr Euch verlaufen? Tja, Ihr ..." {n}Er sieht dich mit seinen scharfen, listigen Augen an und richtet sich auf.{/n} "Verzeihung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich habe Euch nicht erkannt. Quartiermeister Kuravich, ich meine Gouverneur Kuravich ... zu Euren Diensten." {n}Als er sich unbeholfen verbeugt, kannst du seinen sauren Schweiß riechen.{/n}

languages.text: 「ツェフチク兵長！」{n}彼は画面から目を離さずに、怒鳴る。{/n}「気が狂ったのか？道に迷ったのか？まあ、お前は…」{n}彼は鋭く狡猾な目をあなたに向け、姿勢を正す。{/n}「お詫び申し上げます、御方様！お気づきにならず申し訳ございません。クラヴィチ軍需官、いや、クラヴィチ知事、お仕えいたします」{n}彼はぎこちなく頭を下げ、汗の匂いがあなたに襲いかかる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Private Tsevchik!" {n}he snaps, without looking away from the screen.{/n} "Have you lost your mind? Or lost your way? Quartermaster Kuravich, I mean, Governor Kuravich, at your service." {n}He gives a clumsy bow, and the reek of sweat washes over you.{/n}
